title: Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Stuttgart, Baden-Württemberg: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Stuttgart is a city in Baden-Württemberg with a population of 630,000. The cradle of the automobile, home to Mercedes-Benz and Porsche, surrounded by vineyards and forested hills.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
